description: As a Logistics Analyst, quantify shipping bottlenecks in the 'South' region using Oracle Analytics Desktop and the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines.xlsx). Create a calculated metric named 'Days to Ship' representing the average number of days between 'Order Date' and 'Ship Date'. Generate a bar chart showing 'Region' and the average 'Days to Ship', sorted to show the highest delay first. Save the workbook as 'Shipping_Delay_Analysis'.
